source_plan: Increase inventory of sku=TEE-BLK-M by 50 with reason 'restock from warehouse'.

steps.intent: Open the admin products page at {{ENV_URL}}/admin/products.
Use the 'Inventory adjust by SKU' form on the admin products page. Set sku=TEE-BLK-M, delta=50, reason='restock from warehouse', then submit.
